title: Custom Hooks and Responsive Layout
subtitle: Debounced search, theme toggle, and reusable layout architecture
mission: Build reusable layouts and custom hooks.
prerequisites: day05 — React Router dashboard with sidebar and navbar
expectedOutcome: Extract debounce logic into a useDebounce custom hook
Type custom hooks with explicit return types
Build responsive sidebar and navbar that adapt to mobile
Implement theme toggle with state and document class or data attribute
Add debounced search bar integrated with routing or GitHub search
Explain custom hooks vs plain functions in interviews
definitionOfDone: useDebounce hook delays value updates by configurable ms
Search bar uses debounce before triggering fetch or filter
Sidebar collapses or becomes drawer on mobile breakpoint
Theme toggle switches light/dark with persisted preference in localStorage
Navbar and sidebar composed in layout without duplicated markup

tomorrowPreview.title: Machine Coding Round 1
tomorrowPreview.summary: Tomorrow is your 90-minute Week 1 review build: login, dashboard, sidebar, and navbar — from memory, no AI, simulating a real machine coding interview.
